tool.name: role_matrix_test
tool.description: Execute the same HTTP surface across multiple role/session variants and record coverage, evidence, and hypotheses when lower-privilege behavior suspiciously matches privileged behavior.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component name for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being tested, such as "Order authorization matrix".

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method for the tested request.

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Absolute URL of the tested endpoint.

parameter.name: cases
parameter.description: List of request variants. Each item must include name and method, and may provide url or path plus a saved session_profile/session_profile_id. Items may also include headers, cookies, params, body, json_body, and delay_ms overrides.

parameter.name: baseline_case
parameter.description: Optional case name to treat as the privileged or expected baseline. Strongly recommended for clearer authz comparisons.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Default: 15.

parameter.name: follow_redirects
parameter.description: Whether redirects should be followed. Default: false.

parameter.name: similarity_threshold
parameter.description: Body-preview similarity threshold for suspicious parity detection. Default: 0.98.

parameter.name: success_statuses
parameter.description: Optional list of HTTP status codes to treat as successful access.

tool.name: race_condition_harness
tool.description: Execute concurrent HTTP request variants repeatedly to surface race-condition signals, then record structured coverage, evidence, and hypotheses in the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component name for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being tested, such as "Coupon redemption race".

parameter.name: requests
parameter.description: List of concurrent request definitions. Each item must include name and method, and may provide url or path plus a saved session_profile/session_profile_id. Items may also include headers, cookies, params, body, json_body, and delay_ms overrides.

parameter.name: iterations
parameter.description: How many concurrent bursts to execute. Default: 5.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Default: 15.

parameter.name: follow_redirects
parameter.description: Whether redirects should be followed. Default: false.

parameter.name: expect_single_success
parameter.description: Set to true when only one concurrent request should succeed. Multiple successes will be flagged as suspicious.

parameter.name: success_statuses
parameter.description: Optional list of HTTP status codes to treat as successful outcomes.

tool.name: payload_probe_harness
tool.description: Execute a baseline request plus mutated payload variants against a chosen input, then triage response, semantic response markers, and optional OOB anomalies into structured coverage, evidence, and hypotheses.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component or subsystem associated with the probed surface.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being actively probed.

parameter.name: vulnerability_type
parameter.description: Bug class driving payload selection, such as sqli or ssrf.

parameter.name: parameter_name
parameter.description: Name of the query/body/json/header field to mutate. For nested JSON, dotted paths such as filters.query are supported.

parameter.name: base_request
parameter.description: Base request definition. Same shape as role_matrix_test cases: include method and url or path/base_url, and optionally headers, cookies, params, body, json_body, or a saved session_profile/session_profile_id.

parameter.name: payloads
parameter.description: Optional explicit payload objects or strings. When omitted, contextual payloads are generated automatically.

parameter.name: callback_urls
parameter.description: Optional callback/OOB URLs to embed when payload generation is automatic.

parameter.name: semantic_matchers
parameter.description: Optional response markers that should count as semantic exploit signals when they appear in mutated responses, such as root:x:0:0 or 49.

parameter.name: baseline_value
parameter.description: Optional safe/control value to inject into the baseline request before comparing mutated variants.

parameter.name: injection_mode
parameter.description: Where to inject the payload: query, body, json, header, or raw_body. Default: query.

parameter.name: header_name
parameter.description: Optional header name when injection_mode=header. Defaults to parameter_name.

parameter.name: include_encodings
parameter.description: Whether automatic payload generation should include encoded variants. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_payloads
parameter.description: Maximum number of payload variants to execute. Default: 6.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Default: 15.

parameter.name: follow_redirects
parameter.description: Whether redirects should be followed. Default: false.

parameter.name: oob_harness_id
parameter.description: Optional OOB harness id to poll after firing payloads so blind callbacks can be tied back to the probe run.

parameter.name: poll_oob
parameter.description: Whether to poll the referenced OOB harness after executing payload variants. Default: false.

parameter.name: oob_wait_seconds
parameter.description: How long the OOB poll should wait for interactions. Default: 5.

parameter.name: oob_poll_interval
parameter.description: Polling interval for OOB interaction collection. Default: 5.

parameter.name: min_anomaly_score
parameter.description: Minimum anomaly score required before a variant is considered suspicious. Default: 4.

parameter.name: persist_hypothesis
parameter.description: Whether suspicious anomalies should create a hypothesis in the shared ledger. Default: true.

tool.name: jwt_variant_harness
tool.description: Replay a valid JWT-protected request with forged, unsigned, malformed, and missing-token variants to detect response parity that suggests JWT validation bypass.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the assessment ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component or subsystem associated with the protected surface.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Coverage surface being checked for JWT validation weaknesses.

parameter.name: base_request
parameter.description: Base authenticated request definition. Same shape as role_matrix_test cases: include method and url or path/base_url, and optionally headers, cookies, params, body, json_body, or a saved session_profile/session_profile_id.

parameter.name: jwt_token
parameter.description: The valid JWT used for the baseline request.

parameter.name: token_location
parameter.description: Where the JWT is carried in the request: auto, header, cookie, or query. Default: auto.

parameter.name: header_name
parameter.description: Header carrying the token when token_location=header. Default: Authorization.

parameter.name: header_prefix
parameter.description: Prefix prepended before the token when token_location=header, such as Bearer. Default: Bearer.

parameter.name: cookie_name
parameter.description: Cookie name carrying the token when token_location=cookie, or a hint when auto-detecting cookie-carried JWTs.

parameter.name: query_parameter_name
parameter.description: Query parameter carrying the token when token_location=query, or a hint when auto-detecting query-carried JWTs.

parameter.name: claim_overrides
parameter.description: Optional claim overrides to apply when building forged admin/elevated variants.

parameter.name: include_admin_variants
parameter.description: Whether to include elevated-claim unsigned variants. Default: true.

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Default: 15.

parameter.name: follow_redirects
parameter.description: Whether redirects should be followed. Default: false.

parameter.name: similarity_threshold
parameter.description: Body-preview similarity threshold for suspicious parity detection. Default: 0.98.

parameter.name: success_statuses
parameter.description: Optional list of HTTP status codes to treat as successful access when comparing forged variants to the baseline.
